summary:
Claim: Massive blood transfusion commonly results in metabolic acidosis.  
Evidence: - Stored blood has elevated lactate and organic acids from prolonged storage. - Large volume infusion overwhelms buffering capacity, leading to decreased pH.  
Answer: B
